title: Spiral site design decisions
details:
Design decisions for the Spiral of Consciousness site:

1. Astro over Jekyll — needed i18n routing, Preact islands, better DX
2. Tailwind CSS v4 with custom design tokens — "Cosmic Minimalism" (dark: #0a0a14, gold: #e6c17b, light: #fafaf5, indigo: #2c3e9e)
3. Content Collections for modules — enables typed schemas and render()
4. Preact over React — lighter for static site, same API
5. D3.js for module graph — force-directed layout, path-colored nodes
6. Lunr.js for search — client-side, no backend needed
7. localStorage for progress/bookmarks/theme/daily checklist — no accounts needed
8. View Transitions not yet added — could improve navigation feel
9. CSS custom properties for theming — [data-theme="dark"] toggle
10. JetBrains Mono for code/quotes — from Google Fonts
11. All static build (SSG) — works on any static host (GH Pages, GitVerse, Netlify, Vercel)
